summary: The audit for https://moveroo.com.au/services scored 94/100. Below is the list of issues requiring attention.

issues.remediation: Add article:modified_time meta tag or include dateModified in your Schema.org markup.
Ensure you use headings in order (H1 -> H2 -> H3). Don't skip levels.
Add author bylines with links to author bio pages. Use schema.org/Person markup for best results.

issues.issue_detected: Reading score: 22 (Graduate level) - may be too difficult
issues.remediation: Simplify sentences, use shorter words, and break up complex paragraphs. Aim for a score of 60+.
Add trust badges: SSL seal, payment logos (Visa, PayPal), review badges (Trustpilot, Google), or certifications.

issues.issue_detected: OG image found but dimensions could not be verified
issues.remediation: Ensure og:image is accessible and at least 1200x630.
Critical: Use a build tool (like Vite or Mix) to combine all CSS into one or two files.
Audit your third-party scripts. Remove unused ones and defer others.

issues.issue_detected: No compression detected - HTML sent uncompressed
issues.remediation: Enable Gzip or Brotli compression on your web server. For Nginx: `gzip on;`. For Apache: enable mod_deflate.
Consider inlining above-the-fold CSS to improve First Contentful Paint.
If you have multiple language or regional versions of your site, add `<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x" href="y" />` tags.
If this page represents a product or local business, add `aggregateRating` schema to be eligible for star snippets.

issues.issue_detected: FAQ content detected (2 Q&A pairs) - add FAQPage schema; Step-by-step content detected (10 steps) - add HowTo schema
issues.remediation: Add structured data to get rich snippets in search results.
Try parsing your content into Q&A format using H2 and H3 tags.
